caption.full:
Hayden Panettiere and Tori Spelling canceled Creep I.E. Aftermath.

Hayden Panettiere and Tori Spelling have canceled their scheduled appearances at the Creep I.E. Aftermath convention in Ontario, Calif. Organizers confirmed the cancellations for July 11 and July 12. The convention stated both actresses had emergencies, disappointing fans who missed a rare reunion.

Send this to a friend who loves Scream 4!

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#CelebrityNews #Hollywood #HaydenPanettiere #ToriSpelling
caption.firstComment: That’s a shame — I was really looking forward to seeing them together. What do you think this means for a Scream 4 reunion?

youtube.title: Hayden Panettiere Cancels Convention Appearance Due to Emergency
youtube.description:
Hayden Panettiere canceled her appearance at the Creep I.E. Aftermath convention due to a private family matter concerning the health of an elderly relative. Tori Spelling also canceled due to an emergency. Dominique Swain and Brian Austin Green were announced as replacements for the event.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
